title: Catching up with whistleblowers on secret government UFO programs
description: NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz spoke with investigative journalist Leslie Kean and national security experts Luis Elizondo and Christopher Mellon, who led the 2017 New York Times investigation into the Pentagon’s secret UFO program.

title: Latest push for UAP disclosure could be ‘dead end’ plot: Researcher

Suspected UFO Spotted From Canyon Sparks Fresh UAP Debate, US Government Releases Context
description: A video from the US Department of War showing an unidentified object in a canyon has intensified UFO/UAP and alien debates online.
